name: corcept_audit_verify
title: Corcept Audit Verify
description: Verify the integrity of the append-only ledger hash chain. With signed=true also verifies Ed25519 signatures on every row (Trust ceiling: Verified). Without signed, hash-chain integrity only (Trust ceiling: Signed). Authority: Observe.

path.description: Workspace root containing the ledger (defaults to current directory).

signed.description: Require Ed25519 signatures on every ledger row (Verified ceiling).
